title: ClickstreamEvent
description: Canonical schema for all events flowing through the clickstream pipeline

event_id.description: UUID4 generated by the simulator — unique per event

event_time.description: Timestamp from the REES46 dataset — when the user action occurred

arrival_time.description: When the simulator published this event to Kinesis (wall-clock time)

brand.description: Brand name (nullable — many products have no brand)

session_id.description: Session identifier from REES46 user_session field

is_late_arrival.description: True if this event was deliberately delayed by the LateArrivalInjector

late_arrival_delay_seconds.description: How many seconds the LateArrivalInjector held this event back (null if on-time)
